documentation.file_docstring: Create an info card with title, body, and optional footer Editorial design: Clean hierarchy with accent bar, generous spacing, and subtle background zones for visual separation.
inline_comments: Create a list card with title and multiple items Editorial design: Numbered/bulleted list with clear visual hierarchy, accent dots for each item, and generous spacing.
Create an image card with image, title, and optional body text
Create an action card with title, body, and action buttons
Create a carousel container from multiple bubbles LINE allows max 12 bubbles in a carousel
Create a notification bubble (for alerts, status updates) Editorial design: Bold status indicator with accent color, clear typography, optional icon for context.
